title: anthemis macedonica subsp. thracica
intro: Anthemis macedonica subsp. thracica, also known as Thrace chamomile, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Anthemis macedonica subsp. thracica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
